title: LTN4 Subject aircraft under the Select Luxury Items Tax Act - Canada.ca
content:
## LTN4 Subject aircraft under the Select Luxury Items Tax Act

## Notice to the reader
On November 4, 2025, the Government of Canada announced, through Budget 2025 , that the luxury tax would no longer be payable on subject aircraft and subject vessels starting on November 5, 2025.
For more information, refer to Notice LTN5, Luxury tax not payable on subject aircraft and subject vessels .
You can view this publication in:
Last update: 2023-01-09
While all Canada Revenue Agency web content is accessible, we also provide our forms and publications in alternate formats (digital audio, electronic text, Braille, and large print) to allow persons with disabilities to access the information they need.
